plot_points: Shaji Pappan and team win a tug-of-war tournament and get a female goat named Pinky as the prize.
The team gets entangled in a comedy of errors involving a smuggler named Satan Xavier and a police officer.
Due to a mix-up, villains believe the team has stolen something valuable.
The team desperately tries to get rid of Pinky but keeps getting caught in more trouble.
running_gags: Shaji Pappan's severe, debilitating back pain hitting him at the worst possible moments.
Abu's failed, highly dangerous explosive experiments that always backfire.
Sarbath Shameer's obsession with dramatic, slow-motion police entries and lime juice.
Dude's absurd hyper-machismo and weapon choices.

plot_points: The team is still struggling financially and gets wind of the legendary Neelakoduveli, a mystic plant that brings immense wealth.
Multiple factions, including Satan Xavier and Dude, are also hunting for the Neelakoduveli.
The hunt turns into a chaotic road trip with double-crosses and absurd misunderstandings.
Shaji Pappan and the boys try to outsmart everyone but their own bad luck gets in the way.
running_gags: Shaji Pappan's iconic red and black mundu being a symbol of his bad luck yet unmatched swagger.
Satan Xavier's ridiculous, over-the-top villainous antics.
Abu still making terrible, explosive mistakes.
The constant failure of every 'foolproof' plan the gang comes up with.
